event_classes.policy: Inventory and avoid duplicating automatic events.
Confirm enhanced measurement coverage before proposing custom equivalents.
Prefer official recommended event names when a business action matches the reference.
Use only when automatic, enhanced, or recommended events do not fit.

naming_rules.custom_event_guidance: verb_noun or object_action, stable over UI copy changes

parameter_rules.items_array_for_ecommerce: Use item-scoped parameters when modeling ecommerce item details.
parameter_rules.custom_parameters: Keep parameters stable, business-readable, and reportable.

key_event_rules.candidate_requirement: Every key event must map to an event in the taxonomy.
key_event_rules.value_requirement: If value_strategy is monetary, currency_required must be true.

measurement_protocol_rules.session_guidance: Include session_id when the offline/server event must reflect a specific session.
